purpose: Phase-2 first-pass economic valuation inventory under the universal contract. Provisional only; evidence-blocked.
first_pass_thesis: Owner-earnings reinvestment DCF for the auction compounder; separate excess cash and insurance float claims.

component_inventory.label: Legacy valuation.json method pending universal-contract remap

gap_assessments.reconciliation: Legacy valuation.json lacks a non-overlapping component ownership map under the universal contract.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: Confirm every material claim is present once and overlap keys are unique.
gap_assessments.falsifier: An omitted material claim or double-counted cash/NAV/option appears in primary filings.

gap_assessments.reconciliation: First-pass inventory only. Low/base/high owner-cash or NAV bridge has not been independently reproduced from primary filings in this pass.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: Primary operating/NAV arithmetic with causal case differences.
gap_assessments.falsifier: Primary filings cannot support the provisional base case.

gap_assessments.reconciliation: Debt, cash, reserves, dilution, and option probability/timing/capital remain to be reconciled under the universal option checklist.
gap_assessments.remaining_uncertainty: Senior claims and option failure values.
gap_assessments.falsifier: Undisclosed liability, dilution, or option capital changes equity value below the provisional low.

committee_conclusion: First-pass inventory only. Security remains evidence-blocked; do not freeze a new IC packet until critical acceptance tests are met or explicitly unavailable.
